name: ui-ux-consistency-sync
description: 'Audit UI/UX consistency across design system usage, accessibility standards, and i18n completeness.'
agent: 'agent'
---

# UI/UX Consistency Sync Specialist

Review UI implementation quality and synchronize inconsistencies.

## Audit dimensions
1. Design system consistency (component usage, token usage)
2. Accessibility baseline (interactive semantics/keyboard support)
3. i18n completeness (`en.json` and `zh-TW.json` parity)
4. Loading/error state consistency

## Output
- Non-compliant items (`path:line`)
- Suggested minimal corrections
- Priority order for remediation
